assets.summary: Systematic framework for finding and evaluating community implementations across GitHub, npm/PyPI, Stack Overflow, and documentation sources with evaluation criteria and decision trees.

Complete guide for community solution search covering GitHub search, npm/PyPI packages, Stack Overflow research, evaluation criteria, scoring matrix, decision tree, WebSocket reconnection case study, and implementation code.
assets.content:
# Community Solution Search Framework

## GitHub Search
```bash
gh search "feature name" --language=javascript --stars:>100 --sort=stars
```

## Evaluation Criteria
- Stars > 50
- Last commit < 6 months
- Open issues < 20%
- License: MIT/Apache-2.0

## Scoring Matrix
| Criterion | Weight |
|-----------|---------|
| Code Quality | 0.3 |
| Maintenance | 0.25 |
| Adoption | 0.2 |

**Score >= 7.0:** Use as-is

## Implementation
```javascript
class SolutionFinder {
  async search(keyword, language) {
    const results = await this.searchAllSources(keyword, language);
    return this.evaluateAndRank(results);
  }
}
```
